en.page_desc: Palettopia is a cozy, city building and puzzle game about creating minimalistic cities with the stroke of your paintbrush. Paint your way to paradise.
en.og_desc: Palettopia is a cozy, city building and puzzle game about creating minimalistic cities with the stroke of your paintbrush. Paint your way to paradise.
en.home_desc: Palettopia is a cozy, city building and puzzle game about creating minimalistic cities with the stroke of your paintbrush. Explore infinite islands and solve puzzles while building synergy between the serene landscapes and the urban districts. Discover vibrant biomes as you paint your way to paradise and create your dream utopia.
en.home_cta_wishlist: Wishlist on Steam
en.features_puzzle_desc: Solve placement puzzles to meet the needs of your citizens in Puzzle Mode. Create synergy between your urban districts and the local landscape as you uncover the perfect layout for your utopia.
en.features_paint_desc: Splash color onto infinite islands to create vibrant cities in Creative Mode. No complex systems. Simply select a district from your color palette and brush it across the land, instantly turning your strokes into bustling cities.
en.features_paradise_desc:
Immerse yourself in the world of Palettopia. Watch weather systems roll across your city and discover the local critters. Explore four distinct biomes to set down your roots - Temperate, Arctic, Tropical & Arid.

Procedurally generated islands means infinite canvases with 6 different terrain features - Mountain, Grassland, River, Lakes, Woodlands, & Wetlands. It’s not just a city builder; it’s a digital terrarium.
en.gallery_desc: A glimpse into the vibrant worlds of Palettopia. Every screenshot is a unique procedural paradise, just waiting for a splash of District paint and a little creative soul.
en.roadmap_desc: From three corporate drop outs to city painters. Discover our winding journey from ideation to launch.

en.faq_question_1: What is Palettopia?
en.faq_answer_1: Palettopia is a cozy, city building and puzzle game about painting minimalistic cities on infinite procedural generated islands.
en.faq_question_2: Who is making Palettopia?
en.faq_answer_2: Cassie, Cobalt & Stu - a team of friends and family, willful corporate dropouts who are united by a passion for video games, art, and creativity. Together, we aim to share the joy and wonder of building beautiful things with others.
en.faq_question_3: How can you support the game?
en.faq_answer_3: Wishlist Palettopia on Steam, join our mailing list, follow us on social or simply share the game with your friends!
en.news_desc: Stay updated on the latest critter sightings, island discoveries and development progress. Sign up for our newsletter.
en.news_card_1_excerpt_1: We’ve been hard at work implementing lots of updates to both the game mechanics and game content after our first round of player testing. After hearing positive feedback around our cute critters and fun environment, we’ve expanded this aspect of our game while making improvements to the base mechanics.....
en.news_card_1_excerpt_2: To add further variation with the new biomes we are introducing a new terrain type, wetlands! Wetlands is a low area that holds more moisture than the surrounding areas. These can take on the form of bogs, oasis and swamps depending on the biome....
en.news_teaser: Join the Newsletter to hear the next update.
en.news_card_2_title: The Art of the Stroke: Designing the Painting Mechanic
en.news_card_2_excerpt: Our lead developer dives into the technical wizardry behind turning a city builder into a digital canvas...
en.news_card_3_title: Critter Spotlight: Meet the Wobbly Sand-Fox
en.news_card_3_excerpt: The first of our biome-specific residents is here! Learn what attracts this elusive friend to your desert districts...
en.join_desc: Sign up for the Oh Wow Games newsletter to get exclusive updates on Palettopia, playtest invites, and arguably funny jokes delivered straight to your inbox. You may unsubscribe at any time.
en.join_privacy: See the Privacy Policy details.
en.footer_tagline: Made with by corporate dropouts.
